name: fault-line
description: A live seismic operations command center: a shared, persistent world tracking real cities on real fault systems against the actual USGS earthquake feed.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "cross-env PORT=3002 npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
